title: Article Management
description: Manage editorial content and publishing status
confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete article "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.title: Title
form.author: Author
form.contentPlaceholder: Rich text and Markdown supported; use toolbar or shortcuts (e.g. Ctrl+B for bold)
form.editorLoadError: Editor failed to load. You can view or edit raw content below:
form.mediaDescription: Manage cover, video and other media
form.settingsSummaryDescription: These settings directly affect visibility, ownership and extra metadata, so they are worth a final review before publishing.

settingsSections.publishDescription: Decide the content type, visibility timing and any access restrictions first.
settingsSections.taxonomyDescription: Attach the article to the right project, category and tags so filtering and operations stay tidy.
settingsSections.authorDescription: Author selection affects byline and ownership, so it is best to choose from existing users.
settingsSections.extDescription: Use this area for low-frequency but important metadata that should stay with the article.

form.returnToListAfterCreate: The article is ready and we are taking you back to the list to review it.
form.returnToListAfterUpdate: The article has been saved and we are returning you to the list for a quick review.
form.extKeyPlaceholder: Key, e.g. meta.title for nested object
form.extEmpty: No custom fields. Click "Add" to create one.
form.validationErrorInSheet: Please check required fields in settings

hints.type: Different types can drive different frontend layouts and content behaviors.
hints.status: Keep it as draft while editing, then publish when it is ready to go live.
hints.showTime: Use this when the article should appear at a specific time.
hints.isTop: Pinned articles are surfaced first and work well for priority content.
hints.isPasswd: Enable this for internal drafts or limited-access content.
hints.password: Choose a password that is easy to share internally but not trivial to guess.
hints.category: Category placement affects structure and content discovery, so pick the closest match.
hints.project: When one admin handles multiple projects, this determines which project owns the article.
hints.tag: Tags are great for editorial themes and operations; you can create one inline here.
hints.author: Pick the real maintainer of the content so attribution and follow-up stay clear.

editor.wysiwygHint: WYSIWYG · Type # space, - space or ** to convert to rich text
editor.heading: Heading
